title: Birmingham: Centre City Probation Office
body: "Office address and contact details   Centre City Probation Service OfficeFirst Floor5-7 Hill StreetBirminghamB5 4UA   See map  Office phone number: 0121 817 9400  Office email address: WMPS.Birmingham.LES@justice.gov.uk  Opening times   Monday: 9:00am to 5:00pm Tuesday: 9:00am to 5:00pm Wednesday: 9:00am to 5:00pm Thursday: 9:00am to 5:00pm Friday: 9:00am to 5:00pm Saturday: Closed Sunday: Closed Bank Holidays: Closed   Getting here  Find this probation contact centre, on a map.  Walking    2-minute walk from Birmingham New Street train station   15-minute walk from Birmingham Snow Hill train station    To plan your journey by public transport  Please use Transport for West Midlands or Arriva Bus to plan your journey.  Parking   no visitor parking available local car parks available   Accessibility facilities   disabled access and disabled toilet assistance dogs are welcome building has hearing enhancement facilities available (hearing loop)   Court Buildings Find a court or tribunal building.  Local approved premises See the list of approved premises in your area.  Problems and complaints If you have any problems or complaints contact the office directly.  If you can’t resolve the problem directly, you can make a complaint to HM Prison and Probation Service. "
